description: Module sequencing for the voice elicitation engine. Defines the 6-phase administration sequence with timing targets and engagement resets.

phases.name: Orientation
phases.description: Warm-up and screening. Establishes writer context, experience level, and triggers branch selection.

phases.name: Deep Exploration
phases.description: Core voice dimensions: personality/identity (M02), formality/register (M03), emotional tone/affect (M04).

engagement_reset_points.description: Reset between formality and emotional tone modules to prevent fatigue carryover

phases.name: Cognitive & Structural
phases.description: Narrativity/rhetoric (M05) and complexity/structure (M06), followed by the semantic differential section (SD).

engagement_reset_points.description: Midpoint engagement reset before semantic differential section. Marks the transition from open-ended exploration to structured rating scales.

phases.notes: Semantic differential (SD) section is administered after M06 as part of this phase

phases.name: Contextual
phases.description: Audience awareness (M07) and authority/register (M08). Branch-activated modules may be skipped if not in the respondent's path.

phases.name: Mechanics & Process
phases.description: Writing mechanics/precision (M09) and process/revision habits (M10). Branch-activated modules may be skipped if not in the respondent's path.

phases.name: Synthesis & Calibration
phases.description: Contextual adaptation (M11) and final synthesis/calibration (M12). Closes the session with cross-validation and self-assessment.

notes.module_skip_logic: Branch-activated modules not in the respondent's path are skipped entirely. Core modules are always administered.
notes.timing: Estimated minutes are targets, not hard limits. The engine should pace adaptively based on respondent engagement.
notes.engagement_resets: Brief palate-cleansers (e.g., open-ended warm-up question, progress indicator) to reduce satisficing between cognitively demanding sections.
